subject: Two large, muscular male-presenting fighters — one with a shaved head and large build, one with a topknot hairstyle — grappling or wrestling with a third figure in a dominant hold, set against a purple energy background.
suspected_ip: Spopovich and Yamu — Dragon Ball Z (Buu Saga)
description: Two large muscular fighters are depicted in a wide mid-shot. One figure has a shaved head and a very heavy build; the other has a topknot. Both wear dark martial arts attire. They appear to be working in tandem against a third figure caught between them in a hold or press — consistent with the energy-extraction scene from the Buu Saga. A purple energy effect is visible, with faint green energy at the edges. The composition is dynamic and cramped, emphasizing the two henchmen's combined overwhelming physical presence.
foreground: Two large muscular fighters in combined hold against a third figure; one shaved-head, one topknot
background: Purple energy field with green edge lighting
emotion: Dominating aggression — two-on-one energy extraction, overwhelm by brute force
